title: helichrysum geminatum
intro: Helichrysum geminatum, also known as the yellow kniffela or yellow alpine strawflower, is a flowering plant that belongs to the daisy family. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of Helichrysum geminatum include its ability to soothe and calm the mind and body, reducing stress and anxiety, as well as its potential to aid in the treatment of wounds, burns, and skin conditions. Helichrysum geminatum can be prepared as an herbal remedy in various ways, including tea infusions, essential oil extractions, and tinctures, which can be used topically or internally to harness its medicinal properties.
